description: You are the Director of Research Computing at a university AI research institute. Your team has submitted a draft of the annual research overview presentation (/home/ga/Documents/AI_research_overview.pptx) for the Provost's office and external sponsors. Correct the three problems identified in the research integrity memo (/home/ga/Desktop/research_integrity_memo.txt) and save the result as /home/ga/Documents/AI_research_corrected.pptx. Additionally, export a PDF copy to /home/ga/Documents/AI_research_corrected.pdf. Do not modify the original presentation file.

wrong_year_slides.wrong: BERT (Devlin et al., 2019) achieved GLUE score 80.5
GPT-3 (Brown et al., 2021) introduced few-shot learning
LLaMA (Touvron et al., 2022) demonstrated competitive performance

vision_slide_titles: Diffusion Models for Image Synthesis: DALL-E 2 and Stable Diffusion
